Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add MTT tournament engine, admin dashboard, security hardening, and engine fixes

- MTT manager with multi-table seating, table balancing, and large-field payouts
- Admin dashboard page with route and auth gate
- Helmet CSP headers for security hardening
- Big Blind Ante \(BBA\) and dead blind / missed-BB tracking in engine
- Fix postBlind to use += for correct blind stacking
- Chat messages, collusion alerts, and player notes schemas + storage
- Error boundary wrapping app and game component
- Atomic chip persistence in WebSocket with rollback on failure
- Club leaderboard and club tournaments components
- Comprehensive test suite \(95/104 passing\)

EOF
